ai_summary: Future Lifestyle Fashions Limited (FLFL) remains under a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), with this document notifying stock exchanges of the 38th Committee of Creditors (CoC) meeting held on July 6, 2026. The primary red flag is the company's insolvency, managed by a Resolution Professional since May 2023, which significantly impairs shareholder value as creditors' claims take precedence. The prolonged nature of the CIRP, evidenced by 38 CoC meetings, suggests ongoing challenges in achieving a resolution and raises concerns about further value erosion.
